[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000111 4
1 1001001 3
2 0011011 4
3 0011100 3
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0001100 2
7 0011111 5

34 43 1010100 3

56 65 1010010 3
67 76 0000111 3
70 07 0010000 1

13 31 0001100 2 match 6

46 64 1011100 4
